<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/work_addresses/{work_address_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The work address of an employee is used for payroll tax purposes.

scope: `employees:manage`
